MessageStrip.text: New AI dispatch briefing generated for WO-DEMO-003 (Municipal Bus – Cooling System Failure).

StandardListItem.title: Work Order WO-DEMO-001 — Completed
StandardListItem.description: Highway breakdown resolved. Gasket failure confirmed. Closed 2 hours ago.

StandardListItem.title: Work Order WO-DEMO-003 — In Progress
StandardListItem.description: Municipal bus cooling failure. Technician dispatched. Awaiting confirmation.

StandardListItem.title: Work Order WO-DEMO-004 — High Priority
StandardListItem.description: Combine harvester PWF fault detected. Harvest season — priority escalated.

StandardListItem.title: ML Model Retrained
StandardListItem.description: Failure classifier updated with 1,200 new telemetry samples. Accuracy: 94.2%.

StandardListItem.title: New Manual Indexed
StandardListItem.description: Cummins X15 Performance Series — Section 14 (Fuel System) added to knowledge base.

StandardListItem.title: Equipment TRUCK-X15-001 — Telemetry Alert
StandardListItem.description: Process temperature exceeded threshold (372 K). Monitor for recurrence.
